\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID4699 introduces Mode Frequency Relation as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\begin{equation}\ng_{\\mu\\nu} = \\begin{pmatrix}\n-(c^2 - (\\boldsymbol{\\omega} \\times \\mathbf{r})^2) & -(\\boldsymbol{\\omega} \\times \\mathbf{r})_i \\\\\n-(\\boldsymbol{\\omega} \\times \\mathbf{r})_j & \\delta_{ij}\n\\end{pmatrix}\n\\end{equation}
